name: manage_inventory
description: Adjust or set inventory levels for a product variant at a specific location. Used for stock management, inventory synchronization, and handling incoming shipments or stock corrections.

parameters.name: inventory_item_id
parameters.description: The ID of the inventory item to adjust (linked to a product variant).

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: The ID of the location where inventory is being adjusted.

parameters.name: available_adjustment
parameters.description: The quantity adjustment to make. Positive to add stock, negative to remove stock.
